name: Dark
description:
Passive: At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by X.
Evoke: Deal X damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.

name: Frost
description:
Passive: At the end of turn, gain X Block.
Evoke: Gain X Block.

name: Glass
description:
Passive: At the end of turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by 1.
Evoke: Deal X damage to ALL enemies.

name: Lightning
description:
Passive: At the end of turn, deal X damage to a random enemy.
Evoke: Deal X damage to a random enemy.

name: Plasma
description:
Passive: At the start of turn,
gain 1 energy.
Evoke: Gain 2 energy.
Plasma is unaffected by Focus.
